name: Off-The-Shelf Crockpot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup beans (mixed dried, 17 bean types per package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Cook on high for 5-6 hours, or until beans are cooked through.
3. Add the chopped carrots and cook for an additional 10-20 minutes, or until tender.
